/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/control/Controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/control/PID.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/dynamics/Motor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/dynamics/Parameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/dynamics/PendulumArm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/dynamics/SystemState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/math/Filters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/math/Vec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/simulation/Integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/simulation/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/simulation/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/simulation/Simulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/utils/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pendulum_sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o pendulum_sim   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lraylib -lm -lpthread -lX11
